records.m_Talk_ENG: Must stop... Must stop the Administration...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Must stop... Must stop the Administration...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Must stop... Must stop the Administration...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop them. With our lives...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop them. With our lives...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop them. With our lives...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! These test subjects keep coming in!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! These test subjects keep coming in!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! These test subjects keep coming in!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those damn Shadows! How many of these did they make?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those damn Shadows! How many of these did they make?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those damn Shadows! How many of these did they make?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They keep pushing even if they're injured!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They keep pushing even if they're injured!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They keep pushing even if they're injured!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be sympathetic! We're here to fight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be sympathetic! We're here to fight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be sympathetic! We're here to fight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are those Elysium Philharmonic's test subjects...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are those Elysium Philharmonic's test subjects...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are those Elysium Philharmonic's test subjects...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we have to fight them just because they were cloned for Mental Printing...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we have to fight them just because they were cloned for Mental Printing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we have to fight them just because they were cloned for Mental Printing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Except for their numbers, aren't they still just ordinary humans...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Except for their numbers, aren't they still just ordinary humans...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Except for their numbers, aren't they still just ordinary humans...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit! Shoot to kill!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit! Shoot to kill!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! Shoot to kill!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those are test subjects controlled by Mental Printing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those are test subjects controlled by Mental Printing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those are test subjects controlled by Mental Printing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They won't stop until they're dead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They won't stop until they're dead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They won't stop until they're dead!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blood...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blood...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blood...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know battlefields are cruel... but it seems more terrible today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know battlefields are cruel... but it seems more terrible today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know battlefields are cruel... but it seems more terrible today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander Lyudmila!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander Lyudmila!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander Lyudmila!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A salvo of seventy-two Estaque self-propelled howitzers is ready for volley fire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A salvo of seventy-two Estaque self-propelled howitzers is ready for volley fire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A salvo of seventy-two Estaque self-propelled howitzers is ready for volley fire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The next rounds will be ready in approximately four minutes and eleven seconds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The next rounds will be ready in approximately four minutes and eleven seconds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The next rounds will be ready in approximately four minutes and eleven seconds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. This is a battlefield. It is inevitable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. This is a battlefield. It is inevitable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. This is a battlefield. It is inevitable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Faster...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Faster...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Faster...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even a second faster...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even a second faster...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even a second faster...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's... impossible...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's... impossible...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's... impossible...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you moving that fast with Beast Claw equipped?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you moving that fast with Beast Claw equipped?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you moving that fast with Beast Claw equipped?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not just that, you're accelerating! Normally, this kind of output is impossible...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not just that, you're accelerating! Normally, this kind of output is impossible...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not just that, you're accelerating! Normally, this kind of output is impossible...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will you stop yapping in my ear, kid?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will you stop yapping in my ear, kid?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will you stop yapping in my ear, kid?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I picked it. Don't you think it has to run this wild in order to be satisfied?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I picked it. Don't you think it has to run this wild in order to be satisfied?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I picked it. Don't you think it has to run this wild in order to be satisfied?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alice Braidwood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good work. I've received word that the armored vehicles are successfully deployed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good work. I've received word that the armored vehicles are successfully deployed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good work. I've received word that the armored vehicles are successfully deployed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, we'll fire a volley of plasma particle cannons toward the operation zone's area, creating a straight path to the forefront.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, we'll fire a volley of plasma particle cannons toward the operation zone's area, creating a straight path to the forefront.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, we'll fire a volley of plasma particle cannons toward the operation zone's area, creating a straight path to the forefront.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Finally...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Finally...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Finally...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, go!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, go!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, go!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go help the coalition divisions!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go help the coalition divisions!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go help the coalition divisions!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Roger that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Roger that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Roger that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What will you be doing, Maze Commander?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What will you be doing, Maze Commander?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What will you be doing, Maze Commander?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't ignore the test subjects here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't ignore the test subjects here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't ignore the test subjects here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So for now, we'll stay here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So for now, we'll stay here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So for now, we'll stay here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be mistaken. I am not foolish enough to mix up the operation priorities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be mistaken. I am not foolish enough to mix up the operation priorities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be mistaken. I am not foolish enough to mix up the operation priorities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, due to the nature of my division, everyone other than me in this division is a soldier of the Administration. A clone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, due to the nature of my division, everyone other than me in this division is a soldier of the Administration. A clone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, due to the nature of my division, everyone other than me in this division is a soldier of the Administration. A clone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Being a clone doesn't mean that their lives hold no value. We know that better than any division.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Being a clone doesn't mean that their lives hold no value. We know that better than any division.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Being a clone doesn't mean that their lives hold no value. We know that better than any division.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, we will not neglect them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, we will not neglect them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, we will not neglect them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I see any signs of the enemy overcoming Mental Printing and willing to surrender...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I see any signs of the enemy overcoming Mental Printing and willing to surrender...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I see any signs of the enemy overcoming Mental Printing and willing to surrender...

records.m_Talk_ENG: we have a duty to accept their surrender.
records.m_Talk_DEU: we have a duty to accept their surrender.
records.m_Talk_FRA: we have a duty to accept their surrender.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I completely understand that feeling, Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I completely understand that feeling, Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I completely understand that feeling, Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, go. Didn't you say you have comrades whom you must save?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, go. Didn't you say you have comrades whom you must save?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, go. Didn't you say you have comrades whom you must save?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing you now, I'm confident you'll arrive on time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing you now, I'm confident you'll arrive on time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing you now, I'm confident you'll arrive on time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for taking me along!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for taking me along!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for taking me along!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right! You all have been patiently waiting!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right! You all have been patiently waiting!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right! You all have been patiently waiting!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, we will open the path for Alice!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, we will open the path for Alice!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, we will open the path for Alice!
